title: Nothing Dimension
body:
# Nothing Dimension
Nothing Dimension is a simple mod that adds a void dimension called the Nothing Dimension. You can enter the Nothing Dimension by crafting and placing a Nothing Portal and right clicking on it.

The Nothing Portal is cheap to make only requiring 8 ender pearls & 1 obsidian.

![Nothing Portal recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1362a36de4a96e7de865477fc73871a76ca6022.png)
